warning.deleteTag: This will also cause all snippets to have that tag removed.

error.entryNameTrailingDot: Name cannot end with a dot.
error.entryNameWindowsReserved: This name is reserved on Windows.
error.entryNameNoteConflict: A note with this name already exists in this folder.
error.entryNameSnippetConflict: A snippet with this name already exists in this folder.
error.entryNameRequestConflict: A request with this name already exists in this folder.
error.entryNameFolderConflict: A folder with this name already exists at this level.

description.storageVault: Choose the vault directory. To sync between devices, select a folder in iCloud Drive, Google Drive or Dropbox.
description.language: To apply language changes, you need to reload the app.
description.migrateSqliteUtility: If you have a massCode.db file from a previous version, use this utility to import your data into the current Markdown Vault.

body.full:
Hi, Anton here 👋
I build and maintain massCode on my own. If it helps your work, please support the project so it can keep growing.
body.short: Enjoying massCode? Please support the project so it can keep growing.
